notes: As others have said, it requires a player.ini file to be created, it then runs well but only in a small 800x600 window.
title: Syberia

notes: Needs to be run in a window otherwise it's just black screen with sound (known problem with the game). Solution: Making a player.ini file in the game folder, with "800 600 32 0 BaseCMO.cmo" inside. Game works well, but the window cannot be maximized!
title: Syberia
